18.dv: a primitive root (apparently akin (by transmission) to H7901 (שָׁכַב) through the idea of lodging; compare H5531 (סִכְלוּת), H7925 (שָׁכַם));

18.gl: a signal (literally or figuratively), as aflag, beacon, monument, omen, prodigy, evidence, etc.
18.dv: probably from H225 (אוּת) (in the sense of appearing);

18.gl: Tsijon (as a permanent capital), a mountain of Jerusalem
18.dv: the same (regularly) as H6725 (צִיּוּן)lemma צִיוּן missing dagesh, corrected to צִיּוּן;

19.kj: answer, appoint, avouch, bid, boast self, call, certify, challenge, charge, [phrase] (at the, give) command(-ment), commune, consider, declare, demand, [idiom] desire, determine, [

19.gl: alive; hence, raw (flesh); fresh (plant, water, year), strong; also (as noun, especially in the feminine singular and masculine plural) life (or living thing), whether literally or figuratively
19.kj: [phrase] age, alive, appetite, (wild) beast, company, congregation, life(-time), live(-ly), living (creature, thing), maintenance, [phrase] merry, multitude, [phrase] (be) old, qui

19.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
19.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

19.gl: to die (literally or figuratively); causatively, to kill
19.kj: [idiom] at all, [idiom] crying, (be) dead (body, man, one), (put to, worthy of) death, destroy(-er), (cause to, be like to, must) die, kill, necro(-mancer), [idiom] must needs, sla

19.gl: properly, to tread or frequent; usually to follow (for pursuit or search); by implication, to seek or ask; specifically to worship
19.kj: ask, [idiom] at all, care for, [idiom] diligently, inquire, make inquisition, (necro-) mancer, question, require, search, seek (for, out), [idiom] surely.

19.gl: properly, a mumble, i.e. a water skin (from its hollow sound); hence a necromancer (ventriloquist, as from a jar)
19.dv: from the same as H1 (אָב) (apparently through the idea of prattling a father's name);

20.gl: a word; by implication, a matter (as spoken of) or thing; adverbially, a cause
20.kj: act, advice, affair, answer, [idiom] any such (thing), because of, book, business, care, case, cause, certain rate, [phrase] chronicles, commandment, [idiom] commune(-ication), [ph
answer, appoint, avouch, bid, boast self, call, certify, challenge, charge, [phrase] (at the, give) command(-ment), commune, consider, declare, demand, [idiom] desire, determine, [

20.gl: a non-entity; generally used as a negative particle
20.kj: else, except, fail, (father-) less, be gone, in(-curable), neither, never, no (where), none, nor, (any, thing), not, nothing, to nought, past, un(-searchable), well-nigh, without.
20.dv: as if from a primitive root meaning to be nothing or not exist;

20.kj: day(-spring), early, light, morning, whence riseth.

20.gl: a precept or statute, especially the Decalogue or Pentateuch

21.gl: to cross over; used very widely of any transition (literal or figurative; transitive, intransitive, intensive, causative); specifically, to cover (in copulation)
21.kj: alienate, alter, [idiom] at all, beyond, bring (over, through), carry over, (over-) come (on, over), conduct (over), convey over, current, deliver, do away, enter, escape, fail, ge

21.gl: to be (causatively, make) light, literally (swift, small, sharp, etc.) or figuratively (easy, trifling, vile, etc.)
21.kj: abate, make bright, bring into contempt, (ac-) curse, despise, (be) ease(-y, -ier), (be a, make, make somewhat, move, seem a, set) light(-en, -er, -ly, -ly afflict, -ly esteem, thi

21.gl: to exist, i.e. be or become, come to pass (always emphatic, and not a mere copula or auxiliary)
21.kj: beacon, [idiom] altogether, be(-come), accomplished, committed, like), break, cause, come (to pass), do, faint, fall, [phrase] follow, happen, [idiom] have, last, pertain, quit (on

21.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
21.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

21.gl: to turn; by implication, to face, i.e. appear, look, etc.
21.kj: appear, at (even-) tide, behold, cast out, come on, [idiom] corner, dawning, empty, go away, lie, look, mark, pass away, prepare, regard, (have) respect (to), (re-) turn (aside, aw

21.gl: properly, to be dense, i.e. tough or severe (in various applications)
21.kj: be cruel, be fiercer, make grievous, be ((ask a), be in, have, seem, would) hard(-en, (labour), -ly, thing), be sore, (be, make) stiff(-en, (-necked)).

22.gl: to push off; used in a great variety of applications, literally and figuratively (to expel, mislead, strike, inflict, etc.)
22.kj: banish, bring, cast down (out), chase, compel, draw away, drive (away, out, quite), fetch a stroke, force, go away, outcast, thrust away (out), withdraw.

22.gl: the earth (at large, or partitively a land)
22.kj: [idiom] common, country, earth, field, ground, land, [idiom] natins, way, [phrase] wilderness, world.
22.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;

22.gl: to scan, i.e. look intently at; by implication, to regard with pleasure, favor or care
22.kj: (cause to) behold, consider, look (down), regard, have respect, see.

22.gl: tightness (i.e. figuratively, trouble); transitively, a female rival:
22.kj: adversary, adversity, affliction, anguish, distress, tribulation, trouble.

22.dv: or חֲשֵׁיכָהxlit chăshêkâh corrected to chăshêykâh; from H2821 (חָשַׁךְ);
